items.name: FreeCAD-Lumber-Board-Generator-Macro
items.description: This FreeCAD macro helps you create dimensional lumber boards with real-world standard or custom measurements. Perfect for woodworking mockups, planning framing layouts.

items.name: freecad-automation-skill
items.description: FreeCAD CAD automation skill for Claude Code — parametric modeling, assembly, TechDraw engineering drawings, and multi-format export via Python scripts

items.name: FreeCAD-Lumber-Board-Generator-Macro
items.description: 🪵 Generate custom dimensional lumber boards in FreeCAD for woodworking and parametric modeling with real-world measurements.

items.name: FreeCAD-Plywood-Sheet-Generator-Macro
items.description: This FreeCAD macro creates plywood sheet models with configurable dimensions and thickness, letting you quickly mock up real-world materials in your 3D workspace. It supports both **standard plywood sizes** and **custom widths, lengths, and thicknesses** entered in feet/inches or fractions.

items.description: Attempts at integrating Python with FreeCAD

items.description: FreeCAD with Python scripting for a wide range of tasks, from basic automation to developing entirely new functionalities.

items.name: python-for-cad-automation
items.description: Automated part generation using Python scripting in Fusion 360 and FreeCAD – includes parametric bolt and gear models in Fusion 360. In FreeCAD reads dimensions from CSV files and exports models in multiple CAD formats.

items.name: Parametric-CAD-Automation
items.description: AI-driven parametric CAD automation with FreeCAD Python and OpenSCAD industrial asset generation.

items.description: Parametric CAD automation scripts using FreeCAD, Python, and 3D workflow optimization for engineering and AI research applications.

items.name: FreeCAD-Macro-Pocket-Fillet-Hole
items.description: 🚀 A FreeCAD macro project that automates the creation of a 3D block with pocket, fillet, and center hole using Python scripting. Ideal for Design Automation and CAD skill demonstration.
